violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the restrooms, produce cutting, and meat cutting areas were lacking proper hand-washing signage. PIC posted hand-washing signs during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as noodles) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. -knives and utensils in the seafood and produce areas, -ice machines in the seafood area, -meat cutting saw in the seafood area. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the basement area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Pressboard wood is used in the construction of table tops in the produce cutting area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Cardboard is used in construction of shelf liners in the retail area and produce cooler as well as on meat packing machine. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Ice machines located in the seafood area was not in good repair (exposed insulation). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The cutting boards in the seafood area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves (including freezer and cooler shelves) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Floor drains in the seafood area were observed not draining. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The condensate from the walk-in produce cooler refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. -walls in the basement area (peeling paint) -ceilings in the basement area (peeling paint) -holes in the wall behind noodle open case cooler. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The floors in the walk-in freezer are constructed of plywood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
Soap was not available at the handwashing sink in mens. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Handwashing sinks throughout the establishment is lacking handwashing signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled egg) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tofu) in the retail open case cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives, ice machines, and meat cutting bandsaw) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in basement). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in coolers/freezers ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The bread tongs is stored on an unclean surface (top of cardboard) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (retail ) area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
A non food grade shovel was used for ice machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Cardboard is being used as shelf liners in front retail area.Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
(Ice machine ) located in the (seafood area ) area was not in good repair.Observed exposed insulation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The cutting boards in the (seafood area ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (produce walk in cooler vents, sink in produce walk in cooler, and produce and matt wrapping machines) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris in the refuse area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the produce prep area and men's bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The hand-washing sinks throughout the establishment is lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as tofu) in the retail open case cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. -knives in the seafood and produce areas; -ice machines in the seafood area; -meat cutting ban saw in the seafood area; -cutting boards on the floor in the seafood area. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the basement area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The area between the wall and insulation to the outside, located in the seafood area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in coolers/freezers. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was greater 200 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for chlorine sanitizer is between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The bread tongs are stored on an unclean surface (top of the cardboard) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the ground. Single service items should be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Cardboard is used in the construction of shelf liners in the front retail area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Pressboard wood is used in the construction of table tops in the produce prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Ice machine located in the seafood area was not in good repair (exposed insulation). New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The cutting boards in the seafood area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Non-food grade ice shovel was used for the ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the sanitizer solution. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:-retail shelves, including the freezers and coolers;-produce cooler vents;-sink in produce walk-in;-produce and mat wrapping machines;-food cart and ice chest coolers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Floor drains in the seafood area were observed not draining. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The condensate from the walk-in produce refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash around the refuse area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

The following are in poor repair:-ceiling in the seafood and front entrance areas are in poor repair (leaky roof);-walls in the basement area (peeling paint);-ceilings in the basement area (peeling paint).The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The floors in the walk-in freezer are constructed of plywood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
